title: How Much Bigger Could SoFi's Lending Business Get? You Might Be Surprised
text: SoFi Technologies achieved record loan originations of $10.5 billion in Q4, yet this represents just beginning of potential expansion. Personal Loans: 71% of Q4 originations. Addressable market extends beyond $100-200 billion personal loan sector. CEO Anthony Noto highlighted broader opportunity: The real addressable market is nearly $1 trillion of prime revolving credit card debt. Student Loans: Volume more than doubled since 2023 following end of federal student loan payment pause. Noto noted modest 50 basis point interest rate reduction could expand $400 billion market opportunity by 25%. Home Loans: Q4 volume surged 95% year-over-year to annualized pace of approximately $4.5 billion. Roughly 90% of members with mortgages hold them elsewhere, indicating cross-selling potential. Future expansion: SoFi plans business banking services and explore additional consumer lending categories like auto loans, unlocking additional market opportunities.
